Publikationer
Åkerblom, B., 2025. On Typability in Programming Languages. Stockholm: Department of Computer and Systems Sciences, Stockholm University. p.86.
Åkerblom, B.& Castegren, E., 2024. Arrays in practice. Art, Science, and Engineering of Programming, 8(3), p.14:1-14:31.
Åkerblom, B., Castegren, E.& Wrigstad, T., 2020. Reference Capabilities for Safe Parallel Array Programming. The Art, Science, and Engineering of Programming, 4(1),
Åkerblom, B., Castegren, E.& Wrigstad, T., 2019. Progress Report. In: ICOOOLPS '19, London, UK, 15 - 19 July, 2019. Association for Computing Machinery (ACM).
Åkerblom, B., Castegren, E.& Wrigstad, T., 2018. Parallel programming with arrays in Kappa. In: 5th ACM SIGPLAN International Workshop on Libraries, Languages, and Compilers for Array Programming, Philadelphia, PA, USA, June 19 - 19, 2018. Association for Computing Machinery (ACM). p.24-33.
